title: Prospect Research: Bright Smile Dental
content:
## Prospect Research Brief

### Company Snapshot
Bright Smile Dental is a 3-location dental practice in the greater metro area with approximately 15 staff members. Established 12 years ago, they serve primarily families and cosmetic dentistry patients.

### Pain Points
1. No-show rate averaging 18% — costing ~$4,000/month in lost revenue
2. Manual appointment reminder process (front desk calls each patient)
3. Only 89 Google reviews across 3 locations vs. competitor average of 200+

### Recommended Approach
Lead with No-Show Shield (Growth tier) to demonstrate immediate ROI. Follow up with RepBoost once trust is established.

### Fit Score: 17/20

title: Proposal: No-Show Shield — Bright Smile Dental
content:
## Automation Proposal for Bright Smile Dental

### We Heard You
You told us your team spends hours each week calling patients to remind them about appointments — and even then, you're losing $4,000/month to no-shows. That's nearly $50,000 a year walking out the door.

### What We'll Build
A smart reminder system that automatically texts and emails every patient at 48 hours, 24 hours, and 2 hours before their appointment. Patients confirm with one tap. Cancelled slots get offered to your waitlist automatically.

### Your Investment
Growth Tier: $7,500
- AI-powered SMS/email reminders
- Smart timing optimization
- Easy reschedule links
- Waitlist auto-fill
- 90-day support

### Expected ROI
Cut no-shows by 50% = ~$25,000/year saved. Payback period: ~110 days.

title: Prospect Research: Russo Plumbing & HVAC
content:
## Prospect Research Brief

### Company Snapshot
Russo Plumbing & HVAC is a 25-person home services company operating 3 service trucks. In business for 18 years, primarily residential service and repair.

### Pain Points
1. Missing 40%+ of incoming calls — estimated $8K–$12K/month in lost jobs
2. Sends ~30 quotes/month, follows up on fewer than 5
3. Only 47 Google reviews vs. main competitor with 200+

### Recommended Approach
Lead with LeadRescue AI (Growth tier) for immediate revenue recovery. Bundle with QuoteChaser and ReviewEngine for maximum impact.

### Fit Score: 19/20
